message:
🌱 Add fluent-bit: Wildcard character (*) to @include multiple conf files mission (#1787)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "fluent-bit-1294-wildcard-character-to-include-multiple-conf-files-doesn-t-work-f",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "fluent-bit: Wildcard character (*) to @include multiple conf files doesn't work for absolute paths",
+    "description": "Wildcard character (*) to @include multiple conf files doesn't work for absolute paths. This issue affects 11+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify fluent-bit troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your fluent-bit deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review fluent-bit configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant fluent-bit configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit\nkubectl get configmap -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluent-bit\n```\n## Bug Report\n\nWildcards in the  config command only work for paths relative to the path of the base config file. Using absolute paths with wildcards causes Fluent Bit to fail to start up with configuration file errors."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Wildcard character (*) to @include multiple conf files…",
+        "description": "Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:\n```yaml\nsystemd[1]: Started Fluent Bit: Collects and forwards logs.\nfluent-bit[6931]: Fluent Bit v1.0.4\nfluent-bit[6931]: Copyright (C) Treasure Data\nfluent-bit[6931]: [2019/04/22 23:12:31] [Warning] [mk_rconf_read_glob] glob: no match\nfluent-bit[6931]: Error: Configuration file contain errors. Aborting\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Wildcard character (*) to @include multiple conf… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n fluent-bit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the source issue for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit/issues/1294",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "systemd[1]: Started Fluent Bit: Collects and forwards logs.\nfluent-bit[6931]: Fluent Bit v1.0.4\nfluent-bit[6931]: Copyright (C) Treasure Data\nfluent-bit[6931]: [2019/04/22 23:12:31] [Warning] [mk_rconf_read_glob] glob: no match\nfluent-bit[6931]: Error: Configuration file contain errors. Aborting",
+        "[INPUT]\n    Name mem\n    Tag  mem.local",
+        "[OUTPUT]\n    Name stdout\n    Match *"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "fluent-bit",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "fluent-bit"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit/issues/1294",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit"
+    },
+    "reactions": 11,
+    "comments": 3,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with fluent-bit installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
